HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

13#ifndef DOMAINLAYERED3D_H
14#define DOMAINLAYERED3D_H
15
16#include "Domain.h"
17#include "GreenFHom3D.h"
18#include "GreenFLayered3D.h"
19#include "SurfaceMesh.h"
20#include <blitz/array.h>
21#include <algorithm>
22#include <unordered_set>

38class DomainLayered3D : public Domain {
39 protected:
40 // --- Layer data -------------------------------------------------------------
41 std::vector<dcmplx> k_L;
42 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilon;
43 std::vector<dcmplx> mu;
44 std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces;
45 std::vector<double> thickness;
46 int midLayerIndex;
47
48 // --- Tabulation grids -------------------------------------------------------
49 std::vector<Grid> tabulationGrids;
50 std::vector<Grid> tabulationGridsFields;
51
52 // --- Green's functions and helpers ------------------------------------------
53 GreenF *grnFunLayered;
54 GreenF *grnFunLayeredFields;
55 LayeredMediaUtils* layeredUtils;
56
57 // --- Geometry bookkeeping ---------------------------------------------------
58 std::vector<rvec> triPoints;
59 bool enableLineInt;
60
65 virtual int InitGrnFun();
66
67
68
69 public:
70 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
71 // Construction & lifetime
72 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
87 DomainLayered3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex,
88 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
89 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
90 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
91 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength);
92
103 DomainLayered3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex,
104 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
105 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
106 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
107 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength, bool parent);
108
110 ~DomainLayered3D();
111
112 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
113 // Domain traits & formulation
114 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
118 virtual bool IsLayered() { return true; }
119
127 virtual void newGrnFunLayered(std::vector<rvec> &posvec);
128
134 int InitFormulation(dcmplx inVacWavelength);
135
136 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
137 // Layer‑optics helpers (Fresnel/transfer, secondary fields, 1D tests)
138 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
147 std::vector<dcmplx> FresnelCoeff(int layerIndex1, int layerIndex2,
148 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
149
158 std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> InterfaceTransferMatrix(
159 int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ, dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
160
169 blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> Secondary(dcmplx krho, int observationLayer,
170 int sourceLayer, const std::string& waves);
171
180 std::vector<dcmplx> Fields(dcmplx krho, std::vector<double> observationPointsZ,
181 double sourcePointZ, const std::string& waves);
182
193 int writeFields(dcmplx krho, double start, double end, int numPoints,
194 double sourcePointZ, const std::string& waves);
195
196 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
197 // Material queries and layer indexing
198 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
204 int GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const;
205
211 virtual dcmplx Epsilon(rvec pos);
212
218 virtual dcmplx Mu(rvec pos);
219
224 virtual GreenF* GetGrnFunLayeredFields() const { return grnFunLayeredFields; }
225
230 std::vector<dcmplx> GetEpsilon() const { return epsilon; }
231
232 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
233 // Position partitioning & tabulation grid generation
234 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
241 std::vector<PositionGroup> slice(const std::vector<rvec>& pos1,
242 std::vector<rvec>* pos2_opt = nullptr);
243
252 Range calculateRange(const PositionGroup& pts, double rmin = 0.01,
253 double zmin = 0.01, double margin = 0.05);
254
265 std::vector<Grid> computeGrid(const std::vector<PositionGroup>& pos,
266 int nr = 20, int nz = 20, double rmin = 1e-2,
267 double margin = 0.05, double zmin = 1e-2);
268
272 void test_slice();
273
277 void test_range();
278
282 void test_grid();
283
284 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
285 // Incident fields (layered variants)
286 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
294 virtual int AddPlaneWave(dcmplx wavelength, rvec propagationDirection,
295 cvec polarization);
296
303 virtual int AddDipole(rvec position, cvec polarization);
304
315 virtual int AddGaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
316 rvec propagationdirection, cvec polarization);
317
318 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
319 // Field evaluation (uses layered GFs)
320 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
327 virtual cvec SecFieldE(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos);
328
334 virtual cvec IncFieldE(rvec pos);
335
342 virtual cvec SecFieldH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos);
343
349 virtual cvec IncFieldH(rvec pos);
350
357 virtual std::pair<cvec, cvec> SecFieldEandH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos);
358
359 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
360 // Cross sections
361 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
367 virtual std::vector<double> scatteringCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
368
375 virtual double absorptionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
376
383 virtual double extinctionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector);
384
385 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
386 // Debug / logging utilities
387 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
393 void dumpField(const std::string& fieldName,
394 const blitz::TinyVector<std::complex<double>, 3>& vec);
395
396 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
397 // Incident cleanup
398 // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
403 virtual int ClearIncidentFields() override;
404};
405
406#endif
Domain.h
Abstract simulation domain class for SIE scattering.
GreenFHom3D.h
3D scalar/dyadic Green's function in a homogeneous background.
GreenFLayered3D.h
Layered‑medium 3D Green's function (scalar/gradient/dyadic) + RWG integrals.
SurfaceMesh.h
Declaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct.

std::vector< double > zValsInterfaces
Z-coordinates of interface layers.
